name: Interim Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1972
era: Transition — From Martial Law to the 1973 Constitution (1969–1973)
key_provisions: Martial law lifted 21 April 1972; President Bhutto continued as chief executive

National Assembly doubled as constituent body, its constitutional committee (under Mahmud Ali Kasuri, then agreed by all parliamentary parties in the constitutional accord of October 1972) drafting the permanent text
demise: Replaced by the permanent Constitution: passed by the Assembly 10 April 1973, assented 12 April 1973, in force 14 August 1973.
